'''鈭歳-b-s''' ('''rabasa''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:allowance|allowance]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| r-b-s
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:allowance|allowance]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歳-b-s
|-
! Lemma
| rabasa
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:rabasithi|rabasithi]] || [[word:rabasiji|rabasiji]] || [[word:rabasishi|rabasishi]] || [[word:rabasi|rabasi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:rabasuthuth|rabasuthuth]] || [[word:rabasujuj|rabasujuj]] || [[word:rabasushush|rabasushush]] || [[word:rabas|rabas]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:rabasuthu|rabasuthu]] || [[word:rabasuju|rabasuju]] || [[word:rabasushu|rabasushu]] || [[word:rabasu|rabasu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:rabasufuth|rabasufuth]] || [[word:rabasufuj|rabasufuj]] || [[word:rabasufush|rabasufush]] || [[word:rabasuf|rabasuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:rabasethe|rabasethe]] || [[word:rabaseje|rabaseje]] || [[word:rabaseshe|rabaseshe]] || [[word:rabase|rabase]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:rabasothoth|rabasothoth]] || [[word:rabasojoj|rabasojoj]] || [[word:rabasoshosh|rabasoshosh]] || [[word:rabas|rabas]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:rabasotho|rabasotho]] || [[word:rabasojo|rabasojo]] || [[word:rabasosho|rabasosho]] || [[word:rabaso|rabaso]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:rabasofoth|rabasofoth]] || [[word:rabasofoj|rabasofoj]] || [[word:rabasofosh|rabasofosh]] || [[word:rabasof|rabasof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:rabas忙th忙|rabas忙th忙]] || [[word:rabas忙j忙|rabas忙j忙]] || [[word:rabas忙sh忙|rabas忙sh忙]] || [[word:rabas忙|rabas忙]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:rabasathath|rabasathath]] || [[word:rabasajaj|rabasajaj]] || [[word:rabasashash|rabasashash]] || [[word:rabas|rabas]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:rabasatha|rabasatha]] || [[word:rabasaja|rabasaja]] || [[word:rabasasha|rabasasha]] || [[word:rabasa|rabasa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:rabasafath|rabasafath]] || [[word:rabasafaj|rabasafaj]] || [[word:rabasafash|rabasafash]] || [[word:rabasaf|rabasaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:rabasasha|rabasasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gorabasasha|gorabasasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokirabasasha|gokirabasasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:rabasn眉sha|rabasn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gorabasnkn眉sha|gorabasnkn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokirabasn眉sha|gokirabasn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:rabash毛sha|rabash毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gorabasnksh毛sha|gorabasnksh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokirabash毛sha|gokirabash毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:rabasrosha|rabasrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gorabasnkrosha|gorabasnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokirabasrosha|gokirabasrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:rabasmusha|rabasmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gorabasnkmusha|gorabasnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokirabasmusha|gokirabasmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:rabasherasha|rabasherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gorabasnksherasha|gorabasnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokirabasherasha|gokirabasherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:rabasngasha|rabasngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gorabasnkngasha|gorabasnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokirabasngasha|gokirabasngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:rabasyasha|rabasyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gorabasnkyasha|gorabasnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokirabasyasha|gokirabasyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:rabasyamasha|rabasyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gorabasnkyamasha|gorabasnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokirabasyamasha|gokirabasyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:rabasn眉sh毛sha|rabasn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gorabasnkn眉sh毛sha|gorabasnkn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokirabasn眉sh毛sha|gokirabasn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:rabasn眉rosha|rabasn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gorabasnkn眉rosha|gorabasnkn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokirabasn眉rosha|gokirabasn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:rabasn眉musha|rabasn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gorabasnkn眉musha|gorabasnkn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokirabasn眉musha|gokirabasn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:rabash毛n眉sha|rabash毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gorabasnksh毛n眉sha|gorabasnksh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokirabash毛n眉sha|gokirabash毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:rabash毛rosha|rabash毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gorabasnksh毛rosha|gorabasnksh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokirabash毛rosha|gokirabash毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:rabash毛musha|rabash毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gorabasnksh毛musha|gorabasnksh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokirabash毛musha|gokirabash毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:rabasron眉sha|rabasron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gorabasnkron眉sha|gorabasnkron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokirabasron眉sha|gokirabasron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:rabasrosh毛sha|rabasrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gorabasnkrosh毛sha|gorabasnkrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokirabasrosh毛sha|gokirabasrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:rabasromusha|rabasromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gorabasnkromusha|gorabasnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokirabasromusha|gokirabasromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:rabasmun眉sha|rabasmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gorabasnkmun眉sha|gorabasnkmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokirabasmun眉sha|gokirabasmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:rabasmush毛sha|rabasmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gorabasnkmush毛sha|gorabasnkmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokirabasmush毛sha|gokirabasmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:rabasmurosha|rabasmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gorabasnkmurosha|gorabasnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokirabasmurosha|gokirabasmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:rabas|rabas]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:r忙b忙s|r忙b忙s]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:horabas|horabas]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hor忙b忙s|hor忙b忙s]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohorabas|hohorabas]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohor忙b忙s|hohor忙b忙s]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:n眉rabas|n眉rabas]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n眉r忙b忙s|n眉r忙b忙s]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉rabas|n眉n眉rabas]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉r忙b忙s|n眉n眉r忙b忙s]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:n茂rabas|n茂rabas]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n茂r忙b忙s|n茂r忙b忙s]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂rabas|n茂n茂rabas]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂r忙b忙s|n茂n茂r忙b忙s]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:lurabas|lurabas]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lur忙b忙s|lur忙b忙s]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulurabas|lulurabas]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulur忙b忙s|lulur忙b忙s]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:lirabas|lirabas]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lir忙b忙s|lir忙b忙s]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilirabas|lilirabas]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilir忙b忙s|lilir忙b忙s]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:korabas|korabas]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kor忙b忙s|kor忙b忙s]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokorabas|kokorabas]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokor忙b忙s|kokor忙b忙s]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kerabas|kerabas]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:ker忙b忙s|ker忙b忙s]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekerabas|kekerabas]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:keker忙b忙s|keker忙b忙s]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki stative verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|4a6dc77}}
